zh.lifeSummary: 當John Barker於1518年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親William Barker48歲，母親Dame Elizabeth Hill18歲。他和Joan Horne至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1572年5月4日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Barker was born in 1518, in Shropshire, England, his father, William Barker, was 48 and his mother, Dame Elizabeth Hill, was 18. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Joan Horne. He died on 4 May 1572, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Barker est né en 1518, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Barker, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Dame Elizabeth Hill, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Joan Horne. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1572, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Market Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Barker è nato il nel 1518 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, William Barker, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Dame Elizabeth Hill, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Joan Horne. Morì il 4 maggio 1572, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barkerが1518年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Barkerは48歳，母Dame Elizabeth Hillは18歳であった。彼はJoan Horneとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1572年5月4日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアマーケト ドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Barker(이)가 1518년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Barker(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Elizabeth Hill(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Joan Horne(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 5월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마크트 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Barker nasceu em 1518, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Barker, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Dame Elizabeth Hill, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Joan Horne. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1572, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Barker родился в 1518 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Barker было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Elizabeth Hill, 18. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Joan Horne. Он умер 4 мая 1572 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности маркет дреитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
